signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Serve as Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation | NO | HIGH confiden
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Serve as Chair Pro Tem Until Successor Confirmed Amid Ongoing Investigation | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Jerome Powell stated he will remain Federal Reserve Chair until a successor is confirmed by the end of his term, serving as Chair Pro Tem per legal provisions, as this has occurred previously including with him.[1][2]  
He emphasized no intention of leaving the board until
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Will Powell say "Successor" during April press conference?
